articles.author: Mike Cherney
articles.title: Inside the Race to Protect Submarine Cables From Sabotage - WSJ
articles.description: U.S. and allies turn to tech, patrols and new routes to defend crucial underwater infrastructure against Russia and China
articles.content:
SYDNEYFrom the Baltic Sea to the Pacific Ocean, a global scramble is under way to protect submarine cables vulnerable to potential sabotage.
Governments, militaries, cable owners and tech startups a… [+235 chars]
